candidate_definition_hints.text: OpenSPG is a Knowledge Graph Engine developed by Ant Group in collaboration with OpenKG, based on the SPG (Semantic-enhanced Programmable Graph) framework.   Core Capabilities: 1) domain model constrained knowledge modeling, 2) facts and logic fused  representation, 3) natively support KAG...
